\tzpentry{ID5668}{Vector Potential Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5668 introduces Vector Potential Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \mathbf{A}(\mathbf{r}) =\frac{\mu_0}{4\pi}\int_V \frac{\mathbf{J}_M(\mathbf{r}')}{|\mathbf{r}-\mathbf{r}'|}\,dV' +\frac{\mu_0}{4\pi}\int_{\partial V} \frac{\hat n\times \mathbf{B}_{\mathrm{bnd}}(\mathbf{r}')}{|\mathbf{r}-\mathbf{r}'|}\,dS', \]
